title: Network Delay Time
coreIdea: Find the minimum time for a signal to reach all nodes from a source node in a weighted directed graph, which is a direct application of single-source shortest path using Dijkstra's algorithm with a priority queue.
recognitionCues: asks for shortest time/distance from a single source to all nodes
approach: Build adjacency list with weights. Use a min-heap priority queue starting from source with distance 0. Repeatedly pop the smallest distance node, relax its neighbors' distances if a shorter path is found, push updated distances to the heap. Track visited nodes to avoid reprocessing.
